scope: Cycle 14: Bug hunt SFXEngine (sfx_engine.gd, audio_integration.gd) + feat boost_weight faction card weighting
overall_assessment: Cycle 14: Bug hunt SFXEngine found 0 bugs — player pool logic correct, volume category mapping complete, all 27 SFX enum entries cached, all class references valid. Feature: boost_weight adds _get_card_factions() and _get_faction_boost() static helpers. Event cards multiply score by 3x for matching factions. FastRoute cards use weighted selection instead of uniform random. 25 total bugs fixed across 14 cycles.
